display-xl.purpose: Hero headline — Mona Sans weight 500, fluid clamp scale.

display-md.purpose: Sub-section displays with positive tracking — Mona Sans weight 500.

body-md.purpose: Default paragraph text — Inter weight 400. Max-width 65–72ch.

eyebrow-uppercase.purpose: UPPERCASE section kicker — Mona Sans weight 500, positive tracking. Used sparingly, not on every section.

shadows.name: card-float
shadows.purpose: Floating card shadow — applied to floating badge overlays, sticky nav on scroll. Not on static content cards.

motion.name: ease-spring-snappy
motion.purpose: Snappy spring for interactive feedback — button tap, badge hover.

motion.name: ease-smooth-reveal
motion.purpose: Smooth reveal for scroll-triggered entrances. Ease-out-expo character.

motion.name: stagger-children
motion.purpose: Stagger delay between children in a motion container.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.note: Large: full grids, hero split, desktop nav.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The conversion CTA. Orange fill, cream label, 12px rounded rectangle. Every lead-gen trigger.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 24px; background: #ff4f00; color: #fffefb; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e64500; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff4f00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Dark CTA — coffee ink fill, cream label. Used in dark section bands alongside the primary orange.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 24px; background: #201515; color: #fffefb; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #36302e; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #201515; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tertiary Button
components.description: Outline CTA — cream fill, ink label, ink border. Lower emphasis secondary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-tertiary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 24px; background: #fffefb; color: #201515; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; border: 1px solid #201515; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-tertiary:hover { background: #f8f4f0; } .ds-btn-tertiary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-tertiary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #201515; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Canonical form field. Cream background, ink border, 6px radius. Orange focus ring signals the conversion context.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #201515; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; background: #fffefb; color: #201515; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; border: 1px solid #201515; border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #c5c0b1; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #ff4f00; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 79, 0, 0.12); }

components.name: Feature Card — Cream
components.description: Default content card on cream canvas. Canvas-soft surface, 12px radius, 24px padding.
components.html:
Custom Web Apps

End-to-end web applications built on modern frameworks that scale with your business goals.
components.css: .ds-card-cream { background: #f8f4f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; color: #201515; margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #605d52; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Feature Card — Dark
components.description: Polarity-flipped dark card. Coffee ink background, cream text. High-emphasis feature callout.
components.html:
Long-Term Support

We don't disappear after launch. Maintenance, updates, and enhancements on demand.
components.css: .ds-card-dark { background: #201515; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title-dark { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; color: #fffefb; margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-card-body-dark { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.5; color: rgba(255,254,251,0.65); margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Badge Pill
components.description: Inline pill for capability labels and metadata. Canvas-soft fill, ink text, full-pill radius.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; background: #f8f4f0; color: #201515; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky top nav on cream canvas. Coffee ink links, orange primary CTA, 12px button radius.
components.html:
GGawa Developer
HomeStart Your Project
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 24px; background: #fffefb; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-nav-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; background: #ff4f00; color: #fffefb; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-nav-name { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #201515; } .ds-nav-name-light { font-weight: 400; color: #939084; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #201515; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #ff4f00; } .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 20px; background: #ff4f00; color: #fffefb; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 12px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #e64500; }

components.name: Footer
components.description: Deep coffee footer. Dark ink background, cream text at varying opacity levels for hierarchy.
components.html:
GGawa Developer

Build Better Software. Grow Faster.

© 2025 Gawa Developer. All rights reserved.
components.css: .ds-footer { background: #201515; padding: 48px 32px 32px; } .ds-footer-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-footer-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; background: #ff4f00; color: #fffefb; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-footer-name { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fffefb; } .ds-footer-tagline { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: rgba(255,254,251,0.45); margin: 0 0 24px; } .ds-footer-copy { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(255,254,251,0.25); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Gawa Developer's design language borrows the calm authority of a mature, well-run service brand — the kind that doesn't need to shout because its track record speaks. The palette is warm but not decorative: a cream-white canvas (#fffefb) that is slightly warmer than clinical, a deep coffee-brown ink (#201515) that is slightly warmer than pure black, and a single saturated orange CTA (#ff4f00) that signals action without aggression. Temperature is the voice.

Typography delivers the second signal. Mona Sans at weight 500 carries hero and section headings. Inter handles sub-displays, body, buttons, and eyebrows. The two-face pairing reads as 'the brand has a distinct voice for the loud moments and uses the workhorse for the rest.'

The brand rejects the blue-and-slate developer cliché, gradient-heavy SaaS hero dashboards, overcrowded agency sites, and the clinical white-on-obsidian dark-mode portfolio aesthetic. Warmth is deliberate — it signals approachable competence, not terminal aesthetics.
keyCharacteristics: Orange CTA accent #ff4f00 — the single conversion signature. High visibility, high intent.
Warm cream canvas #fffefb — not pure white. The temperature IS the brand voice.
Deep coffee ink #201515 — not pure black. Warmth carries through every text color.
Mona Sans weight 500 for hero and section displays; Inter for everything else. Two-face system.
12px rounded rectangle for buttons and cards — not pills, not square.
A warm neutral ladder where every surface carries warmth and none borrow from cool-slate.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: colors.primary orange appears on one element per viewport: the primary CTA. Every additional orange element dilutes the conversion signal.

rules.name: The Warmth Rule
rules.body: No cool-grey neutral enters this system. Every neutral must carry warmth. Slate-50 and slate-100 read as cold; canvas-soft and mute do not.

rules.name: The Two-Face Rule
rules.body: Mona Sans for displays and eyebrows; Inter for everything else. Do not use Mona Sans at body sizes.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Display and headline copy is always sentence-case. All-caps reserved for eyebrow-uppercase labels only.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Tonal elevation handles depth for content cards. Shadows appear only on floating elements.

dos: Do reserve colors.primary orange for the primary CTA only. One orange element per viewport.
Do keep the canvas warm — #fffefb, not pure white. The temperature IS the brand voice.
Do set hero headlines in typography.display-xl Mona Sans weight 500. Sentence-case, never all-caps.
Do pair Mona Sans (displays, eyebrows) with Inter (body, labels, buttons). Strict role separation.
Do use rounded.md 12px for buttons and cards. The middle radius is the brand's shape signature.
Do use motion/react spring physics for interaction feedback.
Do cap body text at 65–72ch maximum width.
donts: Don't replace cream canvas with pure white #ffffff or cool slate-50. Warmth carries through every surface.
Don't use pure black #000000 ink. The coffee-warmth in #201515 carries through every text color.
Don't render CTAs as pills (border-radius: 9999px). The brand's button is a 12px rounded rectangle.
Don't introduce a second chromatic accent. Orange + cream + coffee is the complete palette.
Don't use cool-grey neutrals from Tailwind. Replace with canvas-soft and mute.
Don't build gradient-heavy hero sections with large metric stat dashboards.
Don't use border-left stripes as card decoration. Use background tints or nothing.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default card style.
Don't animate layout properties. All animation via transform and opacity only.
